svg.title: Astly - System Architecture
svg.desc: Layered C4 container-level architecture for Astly, a P2P collateral-backed lending platform hosted on Vercel: client LIFF apps, Vercel edge and functions, data plane, external integrations, asynchronous lifecycle engine, and the planned self-hosted condition-assessment model.
svg.text: C4 Container-Level View | Production on Vercel | P2P Collateral-Backed Lending Platform
CLIENT ZONE - LINE LIFF Mini-Apps (browser; authenticated via LINE Login)
TRUST BOUNDARY: VERCEL TRUSTED COMPUTE (secrets reside here)
VERCEL EDGE NETWORK - Single Ingress (no Cloudflare in path)
VERCEL FUNCTIONS - Trusted Compute (Next.js Route Handlers; Node.js runtime; region sin1)
Stateless handlers; module-level singletons reused across
new vision provider - shadow / canary / primary, LLM fallback
DATA PLANE - Privileged Server-Side Access Only (service-role; RLS backstop)
Notification.contractId actually holds an item id.
PLANNED - Self-Hosted Open-Source Condition-Assessment Model (dedicated GPU plane, off Vercel)
Integration: introduced behind the existing provider abstraction (a new self-hosted condition provider, mirroring PRICE_SEARCH_PROVIDER / ANTHROPIC_VISION_MODEL).
Rollout: shadow -> canary -> A/B -> primary, with automatic third-party LLM fallback on low confidence, timeout, or error.
Placement: dedicated GPU plane off Vercel. Vercel remains the product and orchestration front end; connected only by a private HTTPS contract.
Money-gating evaluation: agreement with drop-point ground truth on the condition that drives the loan amount, not aggregate accuracy. PDPA-governed training data.
^ training images + ground-truth labels (from S3 / Supabase drop_point_verifications)

g.text: Colors: blue = Vercel platform, teal = data stores, grey = external systems,
Cross-zone connectors use paired labeled stubs (Zone 3 <-> Zone 7).
Dual system of record: MongoDB (customer) + Supabase (investor/finance); no replication.
